items.title: Vol selling + Intraday post (03/June)
items.description: The admin won’t let this market to crash for now.
items.truncated_body_text: The admin won’t let this market to crash for now. As said, June OpEx looks supportive, and the whole market just looks rangebounding on vol and vvol supply. At least until late July - early August.

items.title: Risk is unfolding, Bear market rally? + Intraday post (22/May)
items.description: tl;dr After the May 21 bond auction sent 20‑year yields above 5%, markets are on edge ahead of a short Memorial Day week that brings both Q1 GDP revisions (May 29) and April PCE inflation (May 30).

items.title: Sum, and bias... Intraday post (09/May), Bear market? Balance?
items.description: Now that we’re beyond the 20-day window during which the market hit the level (last year April’s lows) below which I had anticipated volatility selling and consolidation, realized volatility fell from 42.29% to 27.67%.
